title: Indulgent Salt-Baked Saudi-Arabian Arabic Rice Pilaf
description: Rich, bouncy-qq Saudi-Arabian dish featuring Arabic rice, salt-baked to perfection.
instructions: Rinse the rice and soak it in water for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground lamb and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the soaked rice to the pan and stir to combine with the lamb mixture.
Add the salt, black pepper, and 2 cups of water to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to the center of the agave leaves, creating a mound.
Fold the leaves over the rice to form a tight bundle and secure with kitchen twine.
Place the bundle on a baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the bundle from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
